metadata.name: Correlation Continuum
metadata.description: Complete mathematical framework of the Correlation Continuum unified theory.
authors: Derived from The Correlation Continuum: A Complete Unified Framework of Physics

lambda.description: Correlation scale – fundamental length of the correlation substrate.

tau_u.description: Update time – fundamental time step of correlation dynamics.

core_axioms.statement: The map is not the territory, but the map is the territory, and the cartographer is made of terrain.
core_axioms.interpretation: Reality is a self-referential correlation network; observation is participatory; observer embedded in observed.

algebra.name: Non-commutative correlation algebra
algebra.commutation_relation: [O_i, O_j] = iħ Ω_ij + λ C_ijk O_k

definitions.C_ijk: Structure constants of the correlation algebra

properties: Closure: Algebra satisfies Jacobi identity for infinite-dimensional spaces.
Unitarity: Time evolution e^{-i Ĥ^corr t/ħ} converges for all physical states.
Positive Energy: Emergent stress-energy satisfies dominant energy condition.

emergent_spacetime_gravity.correlation_stress_energy_tensor: T_μν^corr = Ω_ij (∂_μ O_i)(∂_ν O_j) - 1/2 g_μν Ω_ij (∂_α O_i)(∂^α O_j) + λ C_ijk O_i O_j O_k g_μν

quantum_gravity_resolution.information_preservation: Hawking radiation carries information via entanglement swapping between correlation branches.

emergent_quantum_theory.measurement_resolution: Ψ_base → Σ_α c_α Ψ_base^α, where branches become correlation-inaccessible, producing apparent collapse.

standard_model_derivation.gauge_symmetries: SU(3) × SU(2) × U(1) emerges as optimal correlation pattern maximizing: local correlation coherence, cross-scale correlation consistency, computational efficiency.

fermion_generations.mass_matrices: Emergent from correlation overlap integrals, hierarchical from correlation persistence lengths.
fermion_generations.ckm_pmns: Arise from misalignment between up/down and lepton correlation patterns.

inflation.potential: V(φ) = V₀ [1 - e^{-√(2/3) φ/M_Pl}] + ½ m² φ²

resolved_paradoxes.name: Black hole information paradox
resolved_paradoxes.resolution: Information preserved in horizon correlation patterns via unitary evolution through correlation branching; late-time radiation carries initial-state information.

resolved_paradoxes.name: Quantum measurement problem
resolved_paradoxes.resolution: Apparent collapse is branch selection; different correlation branches become mutually inaccessible; decoherence timescale derivable from first principles.

resolved_paradoxes.name: Cosmological constant problem
resolved_paradoxes.resolution: Λ is dynamical correlation energy; evolves from Planck scale to current value; natural explanation of cosmic coincidence.

immediate_1_3_years.description: Gravity at nanometer scales: deviation at 12 μm separation
Top-quark spin correlations asymmetry in LHC Run 3
Hubble step function discontinuity at z = 1.57 ± 0.08

medium_3_10_years.description: Neutrinoless double beta decay half-life for ⁷⁶Ge
CMB spectral distortions deviation from blackbody

long_term: Quantum gravity signatures in cosmic-ray spectra
Dark matter correlation patterns in galaxy surveys
Early-universe correlation echoes in gravitational-wave background

algebraic_closure.description: Correlation algebra forms a consistent C*-algebra even for infinite-dimensional operator spaces.

unitary_evolution.description: Time-evolution operator converges strongly for all physical states.

philosophical_implications.ontological_status: Reality is fundamentally relational – correlation patterns, not independent entities.
philosophical_implications.epistemology: Knowledge is participatory; knower and known co-emerge from correlation network.
philosophical_implications.cosmology: Universe is a self-excited circuit – a correlation network generating both physical world and observers.

theoretical_development: Complete derivation of string theory as correlation surface dynamics
Quantum gravity from correlation network combinatorics
technological_applications: Novel materials from engineered correlation patterns

appendix_derivations: Time-dependent solution for a 2-operator subsystem, showing entanglement generation and decoherence.
Renormalization group equations for λ(E), T_c(E), τ_u(E), demonstrating unification of couplings.
Fermion mass matrices from topological quantization, reproducing mass hierarchies and mixing angles.
QCD from SU(3) correlation triads, deriving confinement and asymptotic freedom.
Black-hole interior solution showing singularity resolution via correlation phase transition.
Early-universe history including inflation, reheating, and baryogenesis.
Statistical mechanics of the correlation substrate, yielding the cosmological constant evolution.
Bayesian parameter estimation using five precision measurements, with predictions for muon g-2, nEDM, and CνB temperature.
Rigorous proofs of algebraic closure, unitary evolution, and satisfaction of Wightman axioms.
